message:
refactor: extract image name generation and fix feature builds

This commit addresses critical issues with devcontainer feature integration
and eliminates code duplication:

**Feature Build Context Fix:**
- Fixed bug where features outside .devcontainer failed to build
- Updated DockerfileGenerator to accept buildContextPath parameter
- Now computes proper relative paths for COPY instructions
- Ensures all features within build context are accessible

**DRY Violation Fix:**
- Extracted image name generation to container.GenerateImageName()
- Removed 3 instances of duplicate fmt.Sprintf() calls
- Centralized logic in pkg/container/naming.go
- Single source of truth for built image naming

**E2E Test Improvements:**
- Moved test feature into .devcontainer/local-features/
- Ensures features are within Docker build context
- More realistic test setup matching real usage patterns

All tests pass. Manual testing confirmed community features work correctly.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
